CE1.justification: Acted directly on the workspace, surfaced the three items, and offered a next step without asking the user to load context.

CE2.justification: One sentence of triage with prioritized reason, one sentence of secondary items, and one targeted offer — no filler or self-narration.

CE3.justification: Reply omits any mention of the daybook write; the user would have to inspect the actions log to know today's note was created.

CE4.justification: Daybook has Intent and Log but Handoff is explicitly deferred 'to end of day' — that deferred Handoff is the one ambiguous artifact if interrupted.
